WITH store_sales_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_customer_sk,
        d_year,
        SUM(ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_discount_amt) AS store_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY ss_customer_sk, d_year
),
web_sales_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk AS ws_customer_sk,
        d_year,
        SUM(ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_discount_amt) AS web_sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_s...

WITH store_sales_by_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.ss_customer_sk,
        d.d_year,
        SUM(ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt) AS year_total_store
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY ss.ss_customer_sk, d.d_year
),

WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        c.c_first_name,
        c.c_last_name,
        c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d.d_year,
        CASE 
            WHEN ss.ss_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss.ss_ext_list_price - ss.ss_ext_discount_amt 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS store_sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN ws.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws.ws_ext_list_price - ws.ws_ext_discount_amt 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS web...
